items.title: Member Support Discovery Release
items.description: Release focused on reducing time-to-support through better intent routing, recommendations, and first-session action flows.

customerKPIs.kpi: Time to first meaningful support interaction
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce the time members need to get to a helpful next step.
Increase repeat meaningful use within the first week.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve short-term retention by making the core experience more useful.

productBricks.change: Improve intent-aware home modules and recovery patterns.
Improve support recommendation ranking and freshness.
Improve explicit search relevance and topic retrieval.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out updated member iOS support discovery.
Roll out updated member Android support discovery.

items.title: Employer Launch Velocity Release
items.description: Release focused on reducing employer setup friction, improving launch readiness, and clarifying privacy-safe reporting.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase first-quarter member activation after employer launch.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase renewal confidence through better early activation.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve steady-state participation through easier operations.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of healthy new employer accounts.

productBricks.change: Improve launch checklists and access-code readiness.
Clarify employer setup and quarterly review workflows.
Add clearer aggregate health summaries for operators.

deliveryChannels.change: Release improved employer admin console flows.

items.title: Contributor Trust and Delivery Release
items.description: Release focused on contributor profile quality, live-session operations, moderation support, and payout clarity.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the amount of high-quality contributor-led engagement.
Improve trust in Cadre's live and moderation operations.

productBricks.change: Improve profile, credentials, and topic coverage setup.
Improve live-session delivery reliability and host controls.
Improve earnings visibility and payout statement clarity.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out updated live-session delivery configuration.
